ham.subject: Your Order #1234567890 Confirmation – Amazon
ham.body:
Hello John Doe,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon! Your order has been placed successfully.

Order Number: 1234567890
Date: 2026-04-15
Items:
• Wireless Mouse – Qty 1 – $25.99
• USB-C Charger – Qty 2 – $39.98
Subtotal: $105.97
Tax: $8.50
Total: $114.47

Shipping Address:
John Doe
123 Main Street
Springfield, IL 62704
United States

Your order will be shipped within 2-3 business days. You can track the shipment using the tracking number provided in the shipping confirmation email.

If you have any questions, please contact Amazon Customer Service.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon.com

spam.subject: Urgent: Income Tax Department Refund Pending – Verify Your Details
spam.body:
Dear Mr. Smith,

We are pleased to inform you that you are eligible for a tax refund of INR 50,000 from the Income Tax Department. However, due to recent changes in the tax regulations, we need to verify your bank account details before processing the refund. Please click <URL> to submit your information within 24 hours
